reloaded.description: Number of source tables reloaded by this request.

status.description: Reload status for the requested table.

max_rows.description: Maximum aggregate observations to return. Results that exceed the cap are truncated and marked incomplete.

measures.description: Measure identifiers to compute. Defaults to the aggregate's configured measures when omitted.

temporal.description: Date bounds applied to the aggregate temporal_field when configured.

ConsultationExecuteRequest.description: The exact consultation-v1 request envelope. The selected profile contract names one to four required typed components of one exact subject selector. The complete encoded request body is limited to 8 KiB.

inputs.description: One to four profile-defined component names mapped to string values. Names are ASCII and limited to 64 bytes. Each value is limited to 256 UTF-8 bytes and is validated and canonicalized under its profile-declared string or full-date contract. Every declared component is required; unknown, missing, or duplicate components fail before source access.

ConsultationProfileMetadata.description: Protected metadata for one exact consultation profile. The canonical public contract remains generic here so one operation supports OpenCRVS, DHIS2, OpenSPP, and other reviewed integration packs without generating per-profile OpenAPI schemas.

contract_hash.description: SHA-256 identity of the canonical public contract.

contract_json.description: Exact RFC 8785 canonical JSON for the public consultation contract selected by the path id and version. Clients strict-parse and re-hash this bounded value before activation.

ConsultationResult.description: Closed consultation-v1 result. Relay publishes it only after durable completion succeeds.

consultation_id.description: Relay-generated canonical ULID for this attempt.

data.description: For `match`, the exact profile-approved fact fields, or an empty object for a presence-only result. For `no_match` and `ambiguous`, null. Public facts are bounded strings or full dates, JSON-safe integers, booleans, presence booleans, and explicitly nullable variants; floating-point values are not part of consultation v1.

notary_evaluation_id.description: Registry Notary evaluation id when supplied on the request.

snapshot_generation_id.description: Server-generated immutable snapshot generation. Required only for `materialized_snapshot` results and omitted for live acquisition.

snapshot_published_at.description: Server-owned snapshot publication time bound to the immutable generation. Required only for `materialized_snapshot` results and omitted for live acquisition.

DatasetList.description: Listing of datasets visible to the calling principal.

DatasetSummary.description: Per-dataset metadata. See `/datasets/{id}` for the live shape.

MetadataCatalogDocument.description: Portable metadata catalog. See `/metadata/catalog` for the live document.

MetadataDataset.description: Portable metadata dataset record. See `/metadata/datasets/{dataset_id}` for the live document.

fields.description: Field metadata keyed by field name.

entities.description: Entity metadata keyed by entity name.

MetadataDatasetList.description: Portable metadata dataset listing. See `/metadata/datasets` for the live document.

MetadataLanding.description: Portable metadata landing document with links and an embedded scoped catalog.

has_more.description: True when more pages remain after this one.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when `has_more` is false.

ProblemDetails.description: RFC 9457 Problem Details, returned for every non-2xx response.

examples.detail: no credential provided in Authorization or x-api-key header
examples.title: Missing credential

apiKeyAuth.description: Compatibility API-key header accepted by API-key deployments. `Authorization: Bearer` takes precedence when both headers are present.
apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key

bearerAuth.description: API key carried as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. The gateway hashes the bearer with SHA-256 and matches the fingerprint resolved from `config.auth.api_keys[*].fingerprint`.

consultationOidc.description: OIDC/OAuth2 bearer JWT accepted only when its verified claims identify the configured Registry Notary workload and it carries the selected consultation profile's exact required scope.

info.description: Read-only HTTP gateway over governed datasets. Serves entity records, catalog metadata, and SHACL/DCAT-AP shapes, with API discovery through the RFC 9727 catalog endpoint.
info.summary: Read-only data gateway exposing entity records, catalog metadata, and SHACL/DCAT-AP shapes for governed datasets.
info.title: Registry Relay API

get.description: Returns the RFC 9727 linkset of API discovery links. Served publicly: the document is static and reveals no principal-scoped content.

post.description: Reloads one configured source table through the admin listener. The route requires `registry_relay:admin`, writes the fail-closed admin mutation audit preflight before reload, and publishes readiness after the reload attempt.

parameters.description: Dataset identifier
parameters.name: dataset_id

parameters.description: Source table identifier
parameters.name: table_id

403.description: Authenticated principal lacks `registry_relay:admin`.

404.description: Reload target id was not found.

503.description: Ingest reload is unavailable or audit preflight failed closed.

get.description: Returns the hash-pinned public contract for one exact consultation profile. The response is protected and visible only to the configured Registry Notary OIDC workload with the profile's exact required scope. `contract_json` is the canonical profile contract itself; this generic operation deliberately does not generate a separate OpenAPI schema for every profile.

parameters.description: Exact consultation profile identifier from the protected contract catalog.
parameters.name: profile_id

parameters.description: Canonical positive decimal profile version.
parameters.name: profile_version

401.description: The Registry Notary OIDC credential is missing or invalid. Stable code: `auth.invalid_credentials`.

403.description: The authenticated workload is not permitted to view this consultation profile. Stable code: `consultation.denied`.

404.description: The exact profile id and version are not visible to this workload. Stable code: `consultation.profile_not_found`.

503.description: The consultation profile cannot be resolved safely. Stable code: `consultation.unavailable`.

post.description: Executes one exact, purpose-bound, single-subject consultation for the configured Registry Notary OIDC workload with the profile's exact required scope. The request supplies the profile's one to four required typed selector components, and Relay returns only the profile-approved result envelope and provenance. This route does not accept a subject batch.

parameters.description: Exact consultation profile identifier from the protected contract catalog.
parameters.name: profile_id

parameters.description: Canonical positive decimal profile version.
parameters.name: profile_version

parameters.description: Purpose of use. The value must match the selected profile's purpose contract and is handled only inside the consultation authorization boundary.
parameters.name: Data-Purpose

parameters.description: Optional canonical uppercase ULID supplied by the authenticated Registry Notary workload to correlate this consultation with its evaluation.
parameters.name: Registry-Notary-Evaluation-Id

400.description: The consultation request is invalid. Stable code: `consultation.invalid_request`.

401.description: The Registry Notary OIDC credential is missing or invalid. Stable code: `auth.invalid_credentials`.

403.description: The authenticated workload is not permitted to perform this consultation. Stable code: `consultation.denied`.

404.description: The exact profile id and version are not visible to this workload. Stable code: `consultation.profile_not_found`.

409.description: The authenticated Notary batch child identity conflicts with prior durable state. Stable code: `consultation.batch_child_conflict`.

429.description: The consultation quota is exhausted. Stable code: `consultation.rate_limited`.

Retry-After.description: Whole seconds before retrying, bounded by the consultation-v1 public contract.

503.description: The consultation cannot be completed safely. Stable code: `consultation.unavailable`.

get.description: Runs a dataset-scoped aggregate in `social_registry` with its configured default measures, default group_by, and no optional filters.

parameters.description: Aggregate identifier
parameters.name: aggregate_id

parameters.description: Response format. Use `json`, `csv`, or `sdmx-json`.
parameters.name: f

parameters.description: Purpose-of-use IRI or controlled string. When `require_purpose_header` is set on this entity, the header must be present; a missing value returns `400 auth.purpose_required`. On ordinary entity and feature routes, the value is recorded verbatim in the audit trail but is not compared to a value allowlist; Registry Notary remains the purpose-certification layer for an offering handoff. Native `/v1/consultations/.../execute` is separate and validates `Data-Purpose` against the selected consultation profile contract. Header names are case-insensitive (`Data-Purpose` and `data-purpose` are equivalent).
parameters.name: Data-Purpose

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:legal_basis:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.
parameters.name: x-registry-trust-legal-basis

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:consent:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.
parameters.name: x-registry-trust-consent

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:assurance:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.
parameters.name: x-registry-trust-assurance

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:jurisdiction:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.
parameters.name: x-registry-trust-jurisdiction

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:subject_ref:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.
parameters.name: x-registry-subject-ref

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:relationship:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.
parameters.name: x-registry-relationship

parameters.description: Optional PDP trust context. Relay passes this value to policy evaluation only when the authenticated principal has the exact value-bound `registry:trust:on_behalf_of:<value>` scope. Without that scope, Relay treats the header as absent. Header names are case-insensitive.

x-codeSamples.label: httpx
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, httpx

token = os.environ['REGISTRY_RELAY_TOKEN']
resp = httpx.get(
    'http://localhost:4242/v1/datasets/social_registry/entities/household/records',
    params={'limit': 10},
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}
)
resp.raise_for_status()
page = resp.json()
for row in page['data']:
    print(row)
next_cursor = page['pagination'].get('next_cursor')

get.description: Return a single `household` record from `social_registry` by primary key. Registered household.

x-codeSamples.label: httpx
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, httpx

token = os.environ['REGISTRY_RELAY_TOKEN']
record_id = '...'
resp = httpx.get(
    f'http://localhost:4242/v1/datasets/social_registry/entities/household/records/{record_id}',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}
)
resp.raise_for_status()
print(resp.json())

get.description: Returns the `members` (has_many) target(s) for one `household` record. Foreign key: `household_id`.

parameters.description: Entity primary key
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Maximum records to return. Capped by the entity's `api.max_limit`.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned in a prior response's `pagination.next_cursor`.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Purpose-of-use IRI or controlled string. When `require_purpose_header` is set on this entity, the header must be present; a missing value returns `400 auth.purpose_required`. On ordinary entity and feature routes, the value is recorded verbatim in the audit trail but is not compared to a value allowlist; Registry Notary remains the purpose-certification layer for an offering handoff. Native `/v1/consultations/.../execute` is separate and validates `Data-Purpose` against the selected consultation profile contract. Header names are case-insensitive (`Data-Purpose` and `data-purpose` are equivalent).
parameters.name: Data-Purpose
